steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Predict Feed Go Disposable Postgres · Theory Feed Go Disposable Postgres
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go team handles case 4500 during a publisher-fairness incident rehearsal. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove disposable PostgreSQL, controlled origins, process behavior, injected faults, and end-to-end reconciliation; every goroutine, body, row set, transaction, lease, timer, and pool needs named cleanup ownership; then change one tenant, cursor, reader-state, authorization, cache, or accessibility condition without leaking state. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

Competency probe: Start an isolated compatible PostgreSQL 18 database, apply real migrations, seed original data, isolate tests, and prove teardown.

For Feed aggregation and Go Defend the Feed Go Disposable Postgres model · Theory Feed Go Disposable Po…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: SQLite or a query mock proves PostgreSQL constraints and locking.
